text_block_list.text: One day, as the spring Tenno Sho<n>draws near...
Hm?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What's up? You look worn out.
Oh, well... Hehe. You have a keen eye.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing major. I just didn't get<n>enough sleep
last night. That's why<n>I'm here at your beloved
afternoon<n>nap spot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, you got any new data on Narita<n>Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If there's anyone who can make that<n>idiot panic,
it's probably Brian.
Maybe.

Anyway, back to Brian. Has there<n>been any big
news about her lately?

I do some research and come across<n>news about
the recent Satsuki Sho.

First place at the Satsuki Sho, huh?<n>And she broke
the track record while<n>she was at it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They don't call her the Beast for<n>nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide must have heard about<n>this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah.
Say...

How does someone, uh... bring<n>something up,
normally?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Wipe that grin off your face.<n>You're reading
too much into this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just give me an answer already!
choice_data_list: You should go out to eat with her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Employee
text_block_list.text: Welcome! Grab a seat wherever you<n>want!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin... Would it be safe to assume<n>you aren't a
regular here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Obviously. I almost never go out<n>to eat.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling that was the case. So...<n>how do I put
this...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why did you invite me here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Employee
text_block_list.text: Hey, there! What'll ya be havin'?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, uh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Two vegetable ramen, extra<n>carrots—oh, and easy
on the noodles<n>for one of them...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I saw a recording<n>of the Nikkei
Sho. You were very<n>impressive.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um... thanks.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your chase in the final stretch gave<n>me chills. I had
to adjust my equation<n>countless times to account
for your<n>final sprint.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...So, like, you think I'm strong?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Well... I suppose that's what it<n>boils down to.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've always thought of you as a real<n>pain in the
butt, you know.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You always have been... and still are.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see where this is going now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Could it be you're trying to offer me a<n>word of
encouragement?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha—as if!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's just... It doesn't make sense for<n>a puffed up
weirdo like you to get all<n>deflated and lose
confidence... or<n>whatever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose you have a point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Urp... Why'd they give me so much? I<n>told them to
go easy on the noodles.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Definitely not... Ugh, I'm never eating<n>there again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Really? That's a shame.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I was hoping we could go again<n>sometime.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do you believe in my annoying<n>ways? Or, I
suppose, what you refer<n>to as my "being a pain in
the butt."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do I believe in it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes. Do you have faith in me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I have faith. Because you really<n>are a pain in
my butt.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I see. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ("Faith," huh?)

In the pleasant spring breeze that<n>night, a slight
grin spreads across<n>Narita Taishin's face.
